name: Unstable Potion
description: You may discard the potion at the start of your status phase and roll 2 dice: 2) You die. 3-5) Suffer 4 wounds. 6-7) Nothing happens. 8-10) Heal up to 3 wounds. 11-12) Heal all of your wounds.

name: Shuffle
description: Discard this card. Then, shuffle the corpse deck and the corpse discard pile together. Finally, draw a card from the corpse deck and resolve it.

name: Old Bones
description: Roll 1 die: 1-3) Nothing happens. 4-6) The bones spring to life and attack you. You encounter a monster. During this encounter, you cannot escape.

name: Rope
description: When you resolve a “Trapdoor” or “Hole in the Roof” card or a Bottomless Pit chamber, you may discard this card to automatically succeed in your attribute test.

name: Empty
description: This corpse possesses nothing of value; nothing happens.

name: Small Scorpion
description: Roll 1 die, subtract 2 from the result, and suffer that many wounds.

name: Deadly Scorpion
description: Roll 1 die and suffer a number of wounds equal to the result.

name: Scorpion
description: Roll 1 die, subtract 1 from the result, and suffer that many wounds.
